Settings

Google Apps Script Sync

Sync across all devices — no API key needed. 5-min setup guide →

Setup Guide — 5 Minutes

1. Open your Sheet: Networking HQ — Sync Database ↗
2. Make sure it has 3 tabs: Contacts, Companies, Directory
3. Click Extensions → Apps Script
4. Delete all default code. Paste the Apps Script file I gave you. Click Save.
5. Click Deploy → New Deployment
   • Type: Web app
   • Execute as: Me
   • Who has access: Anyone
6. Click Deploy → Authorize → Allow
7. Copy the Web App URL → paste above → Save & Test

Your data syncs automatically within 2 seconds of any change.

Job Monitor Web App URL

Paste your Job Monitor Apps Script URL to load new roles into the Jobs tab.

Google Tasks

Items pushed from Today tab go to your "Job Search | AI" task list in Google Calendar.

AI Company Enrichment

Paste your Anthropic API key to auto-fill company info when adding companies. Stored locally only — never sent anywhere except the Anthropic API.
